adjudication_basis: AUTO-DRAFT (hand-verify before trusting). Each 'same' label is a class-0 role whose normalized first-def signature is unique in BOTH compiles -- a source-grounded struct-access/immediate that identifies the role independent of ig number and of the matcher's use-site feature, so it is non-circular. Generic first-defs (mr/add/li 0) are left unadjudicated rather than labeled by the matcher's own discriminator. raw_ig_baseline_correct counts labels where matched_ig == wip_ig (what trusting raw ig_idx would get); the matcher must recover the DRIFTED remainder.
raw_ig_note: Of 13 auto-labels, raw ig_idx agrees on 0; the other 13 drifted and must be recovered by first-def identity.

use_site_stress_notes.157: lbz r#,0(r#) <- lwz r#,44(r#) <- lwz r#,mnvibration_804d6c28(r#)
use_site_stress_notes.88: add r#,r#,r# <- lwz r#,44(r#) <- lwz r#,mnvibration_804d6c28(r#)
use_site_stress_notes.81: add r#,r#,r# <- lbz r#,10(r#) <- lwz r#,44(r#) <- lwz r#,mnvibration_804d6c28(r#)

use_site_stress_basis: Use-site-stress labels: GENERIC first-def roles (mr/add/lbz/rlwinm/subf) that DRIFTED, adjudicated by source-grounded composite def-lineage (the chain of defining ops to a unique anchor such as lwz +44 / a named symbol) -- this lineage is the role PRODUCERS, independent of the matcher use_site (consumers) feature, so it is non-circular. Each listed role is recovered by the matcher WITH use_site but NOT when use_site is ablated, proving use_site is load-bearing. The method reproduces mnVibration hand-labels 41->44 and 42->45.
